data.Name: Core & Main Inc
data.Description: Core & Main Inc. (CNM) stands as a leading distributor of waterworks and plumbing products in the United States, serving a diverse range of clients including municipalities, contractors, and industrial sectors. With a strong commitment to delivering innovative infrastructure solutions for water, wastewater, and stormwater management, the company is increasingly focused on fostering sustainability amidst mounting environmental challenges. Leveraging its extensive supply chain and operational expertise, Core & Main is well-positioned to address the urgent needs for infrastructure modernization and compliance with rigorous environmental regulations, thus playing a pivotal role in advancing water management practices within the essential utilities sector.
data.Address: 1830 CRAIG PARK COURT, SAINT LOUIS, MO, UNITED STATES, 63146
